module.name: pyramid
module.description: Layered pyramid / hierarchy of levels (e.g. Maslow, a strategy stack). Body = one section per level, apex first.
module.aiSpec:
A layered PYRAMID for hierarchies where each level builds on the one below (needs hierarchies, maturity models, a foundation-to-goal stack). Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`, one section per level — the FIRST section is the narrow APEX, the last is the wide BASE. Each level label is Markdown. Do NOT use this for a proportional funnel with numbers (this only shows relative width by level position, not data values). Parameters: `color` (color, default accent) — the fill; levels shade light→dark down the pyramid. `reverse` (boolean, default false) — flip into an inverted funnel (widest on top). `shade` (boolean, default true) — false makes every level the solid `color` (no gradient). `textcolor` (color, default #14213d) — label text color inside the levels. `gap` (number px 0-24, default 4) — vertical spacing between levels. `radius` (number px 0-32, default 4) — corner rounding of each level.
<!-- @pyramid color: #7c3aed, gap: 6 --> Vision <!-- @ --> Strategy <!-- @ --> Execution <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Fill color
param.desc: Base fill; levels shade light to dark down the pyramid.

param.name: reverse
param.label: Invert (widest on top)
param.desc: Flip into an inverted funnel with the widest level on top.

param.name: shade
param.label: Gradient shading
param.desc: Shade levels light to dark; off = every level solid color.

param.name: textcolor
param.label: Text color
param.desc: Label text color inside the levels.

snippet.label: Pyramid (levels)
snippet.description: Layered pyramid; first section = apex (top), last = base (bottom).
